meta.title: Find demand and supply
meta.description: Search cross-border demand and supply. Qualified Opportunities Ponte has reviewed, and external Market Signals, kept separate.

entry.title: What are you looking for?
entry.lead: Name a product. Ponte returns reviewed Qualified Opportunities and external Market Signals, kept separate, with what is known about each.
entry.pickerHint: Tap a category, then a product. Or speak it.
entry.noMatch: No category matches that. Try another word, or browse the categories.

results.definition: Two kinds of result, never blended: opportunities Ponte has reviewed, and external signals Ponte has not.

qualified.count: {count, plural, =0 {No opportunities} one {# opportunity} other {# opportunities}}
qualified.emptyBody: Ponte publishes an opportunity only after the opportunity and the business behind it have been reviewed. Market Signals below may still be relevant.
qualified.launchTitle: The first Qualified Opportunities are being prepared
qualified.launchBody: Ponte publishes only after review. Submit an opportunity to be among the first.

signals.count: {count, plural, =0 {No signals} one {# signal} other {# signals}}
signals.note: External indications Ponte has not verified. Shown separately, never as opportunities.
signals.disclaimer: External market signal, not verified by Ponte.
signals.emptyBody: Nothing external matches this product right now. Try a broader product word.

detail.lead: This page shows the commercial facts currently supported, what Ponte checked, and what remains unverified. The participant's identity is disclosed only through the controlled introduction.
detail.receiptsIntro: These statements describe specific checks completed for this opportunity. They do not guarantee the transaction or future performance.
detail.unverified1: The counterparty's financial capacity or creditworthiness.
detail.unverified2: The continuing mandate or authority of the individual acting.
detail.unverified3: The ability or willingness to complete on the stated terms.
detail.unverified4: Final price, terms and logistics, which are settled between the parties.
detail.goneTitle: This opportunity is no longer active
detail.goneBody: It has expired or been withdrawn. Current opportunities remain available.

receipts.businessCheckedBody: The submitter's legal entity and status were checked against public registry and tax records.
receipts.roleDeclaredBody: The submitting member states the role they act in. This is a declaration, not an external confirmation.
receipts.authoritySightedBody: Ponte sighted evidence of authority to act. This does not authenticate every statement or guarantee continuing authority.
receipts.opportunityReviewedBody: Ponte reviewed the structured commercial record before publication.
receipts.lastConfirmedBody: The owner confirmed the requirement remained current on this date.

request.title: Tell us why you fit
request.lead: The opportunity owner reviews your commercial context before any contact details are shared. You can complete this before creating an account.
request.prereq1: You submit your role, capability and proposed fit.
request.prereq2: The owner reviews your commercial context.
request.prereq3: Ponte completes its checks and records the introduction.
request.targetLabel: What you can supply or need
request.targetPlaceholder: e.g. 5,000 MT quarterly, ready to ship from origin
request.geographyPlaceholder: e.g. buyer based in India, delivering to Nhava Sheva
request.reasonPlaceholder: A short reason the owner should introduce to you
request.reassure: Your answers are kept as you go. An account is only needed to send.
request.contactHint: No contact details are shared until the owner accepts.

sent.title: Your request is in
sent.body: The owner will review your commercial context. No contact is shared until they accept. You can follow it in your workspace.

gate.reason: Ponte records who is asking before contacting an opportunity owner. This is the only reason we need an account now.
gate.preserved: Your introduction request is saved and will send automatically.

workspace.title: What needs your attention?
workspace.waitingEmpty: Nothing is waiting on someone else right now.
workspace.waitingStatus: Introduction request sent, waiting on owner
workspace.mineEmpty: You have not submitted an opportunity yet.
workspace.signInPrompt: Sign in to see your workspace.

find.trust: Start freely. Join only when an introduction needs to be sent.
